center.name: 托利马省
center.summary: 托利马省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括黑脚毛腿蜂鸟、托利马花顶蜂鸟、Stout-billed cinclodes等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nigricauda occurs in the northern, central and western Andes of Colombia, from Antioquia south to Caldas and possibly to northern Tolima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: zimmeri, central Colombia's Huila and Tolima Departments The bicolored wren inhabits areas with scattered trees and bushes and is completely absent from forests and wide open areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: columbianus is the more northerly of the two, found in Tolima Department in Colombia's Central Andes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Tolima blossomcrown is found in Colombia's upper Magdalena River Valley where it flows through Cauca, northern Huila, Tolima, and Quindío departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-thighed puffleg is found in the Central Andes of Colombia from Tolima Department and south to Imbabura Province in northwestern Ecuador
